system.flavor: Each petal of the scarlet lily is razor sharp, and can draw blood - a thousand tiny paper cuts that accumulate after crossing a field of them can be death to the unprepared.
system.effect:
Effect [X]: Fly spaces equal to the effect die. After landing, target every foe in range and line of sight equal to half the amount you flew. Those foes take 2 damage once, or three times if they are at range 3 or greater.
Gambit: (1-3): Reduce flight to 1 (4+) Increase flight by +3
Weave first fly or dash you take with your next ability goes +3 more spaces.

(Gambit the effect die and immediately gain the listed effect, usually with a negative effect on a lower die. Unlike other effects, gambits are optional, and effects are not cumulative.)
